---
title: "Project 2"
author: "Evan Whitfield"
format: html
---
```{r}
#Load in libraries
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)
library(shiny)
library(DT)
library(bslib)
library(ggbeeswarm)

```


# Prepare for My App

```{r}
all_nfl_data <- read_csv("data/NFL_play_data.csv") |>
  rename(yards_gained = Yards.Gained) |>
  #Need to change the name of a couple of teams to make sure that there are only 32 teams listed.
  mutate(
    across(
      c(posteam, DefensiveTeam, HomeTeam, AwayTeam),
      ~ recode(
        .x,
        "STL" = "LA",
        "JAC" = "JAX"
      )
    )
  )
```


```{r}
dim(all_nfl_data)
colnames(all_nfl_data)
```
```{r}
nfl_data <- all_nfl_data |>
  select(PlayType, posteam, yards_gained, down, qtr, 
         ydstogo, ScoreDiff, Season, PassOutcome, DefensiveTeam) |>
    filter(!PlayType %in% c("End of Game", 
                          "Extra Point", 
                          "Half End", 
                          "Kickoff", 
                          "Quarter End",
                          "Two Minute Warning",
                          "Timeout",
                          "No Play"))
```


```{r}
CAR2015_play_type_table <- nfl_data |>
  filter(posteam == "CAR", Season == "2015") |>
  count(PlayType) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Frequency of Play Types"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    PlayType = "Play Type",
    n = "Count"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  ) |>
  opt_row_striping()

CAR2015_play_type_table
```
```{r}
CAR2015_play_down_data <- nfl_data |>
  filter(posteam == "CAR", Season == "2015")
```



```{r}
CAR2015_play_table <- CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  count(PlayType, qtr) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = qtr,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  )

CAR2015_play_table
```


```{r}
yds_sum_table <- CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  group_by(PlayType) |>
  summarize(
    Mean = mean(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median = median(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    Minimum = min(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    Maximum = max(yards_gained, na.rm = TRUE),
    Count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(Mean, Median, SD, Minimum, Maximum),
    decimals = 4
  ) |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Yards Gained Summary by Play Type"
  )

yds_sum_table
```




```{r}
ggplot(
  CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(PlayType == "Run", !is.na(yards_gained)),
  aes(x = yards_gained)
) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1,
        fill = "steelblue",
        color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Yards Gained on Running Plays",
    x = "Yards",
    y = "Count"
  )
```


```{r}
ggplot(
  CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(PlayType == "Pass", !is.na(yards_gained)),
  aes(x = yards_gained)
) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1,
        fill = "steelblue",
        color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Yards Gained for Pass Plays",
    x = "Yards",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
ggplot(
  CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(PlayType == "Pass", !is.na(yards_gained), PassOutcome == "Complete"),
  aes(x = yards_gained)
) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1,
        fill = "steelblue",
        color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Yards Gained for Pass Plays",
    x = "Yards",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```




```{r}
play_type_down_counts <- CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  count(qtr, PlayType) |>
  group_by(qtr) |>
  arrange(desc(n)) 

play_type_counts <- CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  count(PlayType) |>
  arrange(desc(n))
```


```{r}
ggplot(play_type_counts,
       aes(x = reorder(PlayType, -n), y = n, fill = PlayType)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n),
    vjust = -0.5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Carolina Panthers 2015 Season Play Types",
    x = "Play Type",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
ggplot(play_type_down_counts |> filter(!is.na(qtr)),
       aes(x = reorder(PlayType, -n),
           y = n,
           fill = PlayType)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~qtr) +
  labs(
    title = "Play Type Distribution per Quarter for Carolina Panthers in 2015",
    x = "Play Type",
    y = "Number of Plays"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "None"
  )
```


```{r}
ggplot(CAR2015_play_down_data,
       aes(PlayType,
           ScoreDiff,
           fill = PlayType)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Score Difference When Play Type Called",
    x = "Play Type",
    y = "Score Difference"
  ) + 
  theme(legend.position = "None",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
```{r}
scr_diff_sum_table <- CAR2015_play_down_data |>
  group_by(PlayType) |>
  summarize(
    Mean = mean(ScoreDiff, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median = median(ScoreDiff, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(ScoreDiff, na.rm = TRUE),
    Minimum = min(ScoreDiff, na.rm = TRUE),
    Maximum = max(ScoreDiff, na.rm = TRUE),
    Count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(Mean, Median, SD, Minimum, Maximum),
    decimals = 4
  ) |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Score Difference when Play Happened"
  )

scr_diff_sum_table
```



```{r}
ggplot(CAR2015_play_down_data,
       aes(ydstogo,
           yards_gained,
           color = PlayType)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .67) +
  labs(
    title = "Yards Gained vs. Yards to Go",
    x = "Yards Needed to Get First Down",
    y = "Yards Gained from Play"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(
  CAR2015_play_down_data,
  aes(
    x = factor(qtr),
    y = yards_gained,
    color = PlayType
  )
) +
  geom_quasirandom(alpha = 0.4, width = 0.25) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Yards Gained by Down",
    x = "Quarter",
    y = "Yards Gained",
    color = "Play Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(
  CAR2015_play_down_data |> filter(DefensiveTeam == "ATL"),
  aes(
    x = factor(qtr),
    y = yards_gained,
    color = PlayType
  )
) +
  geom_quasirandom(alpha = 0.8, width = 0.25) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Yards Gained by Down vs. Atlanta Falcons",
    x = "Quarter",
    y = "Yards Gained",
    color = "Play Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
